title: Boykisser
description: A whimsical little mod that brings the internet famous Boykisser meme into Minecraft! This mod adds a new neutral mob the Boykisser a fluffy, mischievous creature ready to roam your world, annoy you just a little, and maybe even become your friend.
body:
# V2 Alpha Out Now [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/jRSz4AJjAw) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-%23FF0000.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=YouTube&logoColor=white)](https://www.youtube.com/@sketch494?sub_confirmation=1) [![Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-F16061?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/sk3tch) ---
![boy_kisser_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cb0d69341532ddd889d26db1d8f119885b6981d.png) ![boy_kisser_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e6d34d01de2013e787eff70b50ed10a43d85e8.png) ---
![about_the_mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496971dd84e7acca69bc09ddb425a4789160cc28.png)
Credits Boykisser is a Minecraft mod developed by the Eciipse Studios™ team. sketch494 | Owner | Lead | Lead Developer impactgamin | COO | Lead Developer | 3D Designer - made a lot of the code and the silly cat model Smudgy | 3D artist - made the old silly cat model from the first part of the V2 update that was reshaped to fit the mods look
What the mod adds This mod adds the well known silly cat meme into Minecraft as a unique mob. Only one will naturally spawn per world, making it rare and special.
Taming You can tame the cat using cookies or sweet berries. Once tamed, the cat becomes linked to the health of the player who tamed it, or whoever is holding the amulet.
![features_of_the_the_mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4696560cac5f2979c43e67e5b3d07254f8513c62.png) ...
